summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive hydrated items were detected, and the job does not permit merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, or low-signal closeout. All ten seed PRs remain open for their own review/proof path.

actions.reason: Focused bug-fix PR with maintainer/review-bot follow-up; no merge or repair action is allowed in this job.
Keep open as an independent proof-needed PR; failed proof blocks finalization.
Distinct focused follow-up PR should remain open for maintainer/proof review.
Keep open as an independent broad feature/API PR with failed proof.
Likely useful canonical fix for its own issue family, but this job cannot merge or repair and requires human review.
Potential low-signal/docs correctness decision, but low-signal close is disabled and maintainer review is required.
Focused technical correctness decision remains after bot review; no repair or merge action is permitted.
Performance/startup change is independent and plausibly useful, but final correctness review is for maintainers.
Keep open as an independent PR waiting on author/check cleanup.
Focused message-delivery fix with an overlapping hydrated PR; final canonical path and technical review require a maintainer.
